items.title: Implement new user onboarding flow
items.body: Main onboarding epic. Jira DEV-42, Figma abc123XYZ, Notion PRD, PR #189.

items.title: Implement API v2 versioning strategy
items.body: API v2 versioning. Jira DEV-50, Confluence ADR, Linear ENG-102, PR #191.

items.title: Dashboard charts render slowly with >10k data points
items.body: BigCo flagged in Gong demo call. Eve investigating. Related to dark mode #236.

items.title: Add dark mode toggle and theme system
items.body: Jira DEV-55, Linear ENG-110, Figma Dashboard Redesign. Depends on #228 perf fix.

items.title: Onboarding: skip option for profile setup step
items.body: From Figma feedback (alice.chen). Jira DEV-44, part of onboarding epic DEV-42.

items.title: API v2: rate limiting returns incorrect headers
items.body: Part of API v2 (DEV-50). Rate limiting headers per Confluence ADR.

items.title: Mobile: deep link fallback for unsupported OS versions
items.body: Fallback for DEV-34 fix. Deep link to web when native not supported.

items.title: Onboarding: team invite email not sending
items.body: Part of onboarding (DEV-42, DEV-45). Email service integration needed.

items.title: API v2: pagination cursor for list endpoints
items.body: API v2 (DEV-50). Cursor-based pagination for large result sets.

items.title: Dashboard: chart tooltip positioning on mobile
items.body: Dashboard v2 (DEV-55). Touch target sizing for mobile charts.

items.title: Onboarding: analytics event tracking
items.body: Onboarding (DEV-42). Track funnel metrics per Notion PRD requirements.

items.title: API v2: webhook delivery retry logic
items.body: API v2 (DEV-50). Exponential backoff for webhook delivery.

items.title: Dark mode: high contrast accessibility mode
items.body: Dark mode (DEV-55). WCAG AAA contrast ratios per Figma design system.

items.title: Mobile: push notification for onboarding completion
items.body: Onboarding (DEV-42). Notify users who started but did not complete.

items.title: Users unable to reset password via mobile deep link
items.body: Blocking v2.1.0 release. Jira DEV-34, Linear ENG-103, PR #190. Customer reported in Gong call.
